source_title: Synthesis of MWCNTs by chemical vapor deposition of methane using FeMo/MgO catalyst: role of hydrogen and kinetic study
authors_or_assignee: Chawalkul Chotmunkhongsin; Sakhon Ratchahat; Weerawut Chaiwat; Tawatchai Charinpanitkul; Apinan Soottitantawat
source_section: Experimental; Roles of hydrogen; Tables 2-4; Figs. 3-12
run_summary: No H2 pre-reduction and no H2 co-feed; 50/150 sccm CH4/N2 at 900 °C for 180 min produced 0.85 g-CNT/g-catalyst with 52.81% TGA carbon.
notes: This is the same nR-woH2 condition appearing in Tables 2, 3 and 4 and is stored once. combo_key is derived, not source-reported.

source_title: Synthesis of MWCNTs by chemical vapor deposition of methane using FeMo/MgO catalyst: role of hydrogen and kinetic study
authors_or_assignee: Chawalkul Chotmunkhongsin; Sakhon Ratchahat; Weerawut Chaiwat; Tawatchai Charinpanitkul; Apinan Soottitantawat
source_section: Effect of H2 concentration; Table 4; Figs. 11-12
run_summary: No H2 pre-reduction; 50/25/125 sccm CH4/H2/N2 at 900 °C for 180 min produced 1.35 g-CNT/g-catalyst.
notes: N2=125 sccm is calculated from the reported total flow of 200 sccm. combo_key is derived.

source_title: Synthesis of MWCNTs by chemical vapor deposition of methane using FeMo/MgO catalyst: role of hydrogen and kinetic study
authors_or_assignee: Chawalkul Chotmunkhongsin; Sakhon Ratchahat; Weerawut Chaiwat; Tawatchai Charinpanitkul; Apinan Soottitantawat
source_section: Effect of H2 concentration; Table 4; Figs. 11-12
run_summary: No H2 pre-reduction; 50/50/100 sccm CH4/H2/N2 at 900 °C for 180 min gave the highest reported g-CNT/g-catalyst (1.47) in the non-reduced H2-ratio series.
notes: N2=100 sccm is calculated from the reported total flow of 200 sccm. combo_key is derived.

source_title: Synthesis of MWCNTs by chemical vapor deposition of methane using FeMo/MgO catalyst: role of hydrogen and kinetic study
authors_or_assignee: Chawalkul Chotmunkhongsin; Sakhon Ratchahat; Weerawut Chaiwat; Tawatchai Charinpanitkul; Apinan Soottitantawat
source_section: Roles of hydrogen; Effect of H2 concentration; Tables 2-4; Figs. 3-12
run_summary: No H2 pre-reduction; 50/100/50 sccm CH4/H2/N2 at 900 °C for 180 min produced 1.37 g-CNT/g-catalyst; carbon-yield percentage conflicts between Tables 3 and 4.
notes: The same nR-wH2 condition appears in Tables 2-4 and is stored once. Yield conflict requires human review. combo_key is derived.

source_title: Synthesis of MWCNTs by chemical vapor deposition of methane using FeMo/MgO catalyst: role of hydrogen and kinetic study
authors_or_assignee: Chawalkul Chotmunkhongsin; Sakhon Ratchahat; Weerawut Chaiwat; Tawatchai Charinpanitkul; Apinan Soottitantawat
source_section: Effect of H2 concentration; Table 4; Figs. 11-12
run_summary: No H2 pre-reduction; 50/150/0 sccm CH4/H2/N2 at 900 °C for 180 min produced 0.93 g-CNT/g-catalyst, showing yield loss at excess H2.
notes: N2=0 sccm is calculated from the reported total flow of 200 sccm. combo_key is derived.

source_title: Synthesis of MWCNTs by chemical vapor deposition of methane using FeMo/MgO catalyst: role of hydrogen and kinetic study
authors_or_assignee: Chawalkul Chotmunkhongsin; Sakhon Ratchahat; Weerawut Chaiwat; Tawatchai Charinpanitkul; Apinan Soottitantawat
run_summary: H2 pre-reduction in 50/100 sccm N2/H2 followed by 50/150 sccm CH4/N2 growth at 900 °C for 180 min produced the highest overall reported yield: 5.77 g-CNT/g-catalyst.
notes: Selected by the authors for later kinetic work; kinetic-series points are not duplicated here. combo_key is derived.

source_title: Synthesis of MWCNTs by chemical vapor deposition of methane using FeMo/MgO catalyst: role of hydrogen and kinetic study
authors_or_assignee: Chawalkul Chotmunkhongsin; Sakhon Ratchahat; Weerawut Chaiwat; Tawatchai Charinpanitkul; Apinan Soottitantawat
run_summary: H2 pre-reduction followed by 50/100/50 sccm CH4/H2/N2 growth at 900 °C for 180 min produced 5.61 g-CNT/g-catalyst; H2 co-feed did not improve stability or Raman IG/ID.
notes: The 300 min stability comparison is retained as an observation rather than a duplicate formal run. combo_key is derived.
